comparison_steps.description: Search for certificate consignor name 'Nouryon Functional Chemicals AB' in all invoice pages.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND - Name appears in invoice header on pages 1, 2, and 3 as 'Nouryon Functional Chemicals AB'. Also in VAT field, footer text, and company seal on page 2.

Certificate: 'Nouryon Functional Chemicals AB' (with duplicate line 'Chemicals AB' treated as line-wrap). Invoice header: 'Nouryon Functional Chemicals AB'. Names are identical after normalization. The second line 'Chemicals AB' in the certificate is a duplication of the tail of the first line — all words in the invoice name appear in the certificate name, and the only difference is that 'Chemicals AB' is repeated once extra. Per rule 4.1.3.1 repeated word duplicate rule, this is MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate country: SWEDEN. Invoice issuer address: Sweden. VAT prefix: SE (SE556234939801) confirms Sweden.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur - consignor name found in invoice header
Juridisk part - repeated word duplicate accepted (Chemicals AB repeated)
Land verified via explicit address and VAT prefix SE

comparison_checkpoints.debug_explanation: The certificate consignor is 'Nouryon Functional Chemicals AB' with a duplicate line 'Chemicals AB'. The invoice issuer is 'Nouryon Functional Chemicals AB' in the header. The core company name is identical. The duplicate line is treated as a line-wrap/print artifact per rule 4.1.3.1 (repeated word duplicate). Country is SWEDEN in both. Address differs (Gamlestadsvägen 18B vs BOX 47067) but per rule 4.1.5, address differences do not cause MISMATCH — only company name and country matter. MATCH.
comparison_checkpoints.motivation: Consignor name 'Nouryon Functional Chemicals AB' is identical in both certificate and invoice header. The second line 'Chemicals AB' in the certificate is a repeated duplicate and does not change the identity. Country Sweden verified via address and VAT prefix SE.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice Bill To field: 'Nouryon Chemicals India Pvt Ltd.' Certificate consignee: 'Nouryon Chemicals India Private Ltd'. Compare names.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'Nouryon Chemicals India Private Ltd'. Bill To: 'Nouryon Chemicals India Pvt Ltd.' — 'Pvt' vs 'Private' is a legal form abbreviation (4.1.3.6 applied via 4.2 normalization). The core name 'Nouryon Chemicals India' is identical. MATCH on name.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignee country: India. Invoice Bill To country: INDIA.

The Ship To field also matches: 'Nouryon Chemicals India Private Ltd.' at the exact same address as the certificate consignee (C/O M/S.Damco India Private Limited, Elavambedu, Ponneri Taluk, etc.). This further confirms the match.

rules_applied.description: Prioritetsordning - Bill To field used as primary consignee
Legal form abbreviation - 'Private' vs 'Pvt' accepted as equivalent
MATCH criteria met: name and country verified

comparison_checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Nouryon Chemicals India Private Ltd' in India. Invoice Bill To is 'Nouryon Chemicals India Pvt Ltd.' in India. 'Private' vs 'Pvt' is a standard legal form abbreviation allowed under 4.1.3.6. The core name 'Nouryon Chemicals India' is identical. Country India matches. Additionally, the Ship To field contains the exact same name and address as the certificate consignee, further confirming the match. Address difference between Bill To (Thane) and certificate (Chennai) does not cause MISMATCH per rule 4.2.4 — company name and country are what matters. MATCH.
comparison_checkpoints.motivation: Consignee 'Nouryon Chemicals India Private Ltd' matches invoice Bill To 'Nouryon Chemicals India Pvt Ltd.' — 'Private' vs 'Pvt' is an accepted legal form abbreviation. Country India matches in both. Ship To also confirms the same party at the exact address stated in the certificate.

comparison_steps.description: No explicit article numbers in the certificate goods description field. Material No. 8028106 appears only in the invoice. The certificate does not reference article numbers. Proceed to Prioritet 2.
comparison_steps.result: Not applicable - no article numbers in certificate.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate goods: 'BERMOCOLLPRIMEAP220/600 - SE'. This is a concatenated string. The identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning is 'BERMOCOLL PRIME AP2 20/600'. Invoice: 'BERMOCOLL PRIME AP2 20/600'. Comparing after normalization of spaces: the certificate string 'BERMOCOLLPRIMEAP220/600' when decomposed contains the same product designation as the invoice 'BERMOCOLL PRIME AP2 20/600'. The characters match: B-E-R-M-O-C-O-L-L-P-R-I-M-E-A-P-2-2-0-/-6-0-0. The only difference is missing spaces in the certificate. Spaces are allowed to be normalized. The suffix '- SE' in the certificate is a non-identity-bearing addition (geographic designation matching origin country Sweden, per rule 4.3.4).
comparison_steps.result: MATCH after space normalization. 'BERMOCOLLPRIMEAP220/600' = 'BERMOCOLL PRIME AP2 20/600' with spaces removed.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing designation identified
Non-identity-bearing addition - '- SE' suffix is geographic designation matching origin country, ignored

comparison_checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description 'BERMOCOLLPRIMEAP220/600 - SE' is a concatenated version of 'BERMOCOLL PRIME AP2 20/600 - SE'. After normalizing spaces, the identity-bearing designation 'BERMOCOLL PRIME AP2 20/600' matches exactly with the invoice's 'BERMOCOLL PRIME AP2 20/600' (items 10 and 11). The '- SE' suffix is a geographic designation corresponding to the origin country Sweden and is non-identity-bearing per 4.3.4. Both items in the invoice contain the same product. MATCH.
comparison_checkpoints.motivation: Certificate product 'BERMOCOLLPRIMEAP220/600' matches invoice product 'BERMOCOLL PRIME AP2 20/600' after space normalization. The '- SE' suffix is a non-identity-bearing geographic designation. Both invoice line items contain the same product.

comparison_checkpoints.certificate_value: 12.384,000KG G.W. (per line, two lines) and 600 PACKAGES (per line, two lines)
comparison_checkpoints.invoice_value: Gross Weight 12.384,000 KG per line item (items 10 and 11), No of Packages 600 PIECES per line item

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains '12.384,000KG G.W.' repeated twice (once per line item). This is the verification-grounding quantity. European number format: 12.384,000 = 12,384.000 KG GW.
comparison_steps.result: Verification-grounding value: 12,384.000 KG GW per line item (two items).

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 12,384.000 KG GW per line item. Invoice states Gross Weight 12.384,000 KG per line item (items 10 and 11). After thousands-separator normalization (4.4.3.3): invoice value = 12,384.000 KG. Certificate value = 12,384.000 KG. Both are GW. Direct match per line item.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - 12,384.000 KG GW per line matches exactly.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 600 PACKAGES per line. Invoice: No of Packages 600 PIECES per line. 600 = 600. PACKAGES vs PIECES is a unit difference but per 4.4.3 the numeric value is what matters and units need not be identical. Numeric match.

rules_applied.description: Thousands separator normalization - period as thousands separator in European format
Direct verification - numeric value and weight category verified per line item
Weight category GW explicitly stated in certificate and matches invoice Gross Weight

comparison_checkpoints.debug_explanation: The certificate has two line items, each with 12.384,000KG G.W. in box 7 and 600 PACKAGES in box 6. The invoice has two line items (10 and 11), each with Gross Weight 12.384,000 KG and 600 PIECES. After thousands-separator normalization (period = thousands separator in European format), certificate value 12,384.000 KG GW matches invoice Gross Weight 12,384.000 KG per line. Additionally, 600 packages matches 600 pieces numerically. No summation needed — direct per-line match. MATCH.
comparison_checkpoints.motivation: Certificate quantity 12,384.000 KG GW per line item matches invoice Gross Weight 12,384.000 KG per line item exactly (after thousands-separator normalization). Package count 600 also matches per line. Both documents have two identical line items.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice explicitly states 'Country of Origin Sweden' for both item 10 and item 11.
comparison_steps.result: Origin field found: 'Sweden' for both items.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'sweden' (lowercase). Invoice: 'Sweden'. After case normalization, both are 'Sweden'.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in explicit 'Country of Origin' field in invoice
MATCH - origin explicitly identified in invoice

comparison_checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'sweden'. Invoice states 'Country of Origin Sweden' for both line items. After case normalization, both are 'Sweden'. Single origin country, no mixed origins. MATCH.
comparison_checkpoints.motivation: Certificate origin 'sweden' matches invoice 'Country of Origin Sweden' for both line items after case normalization.

rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: No LC reference found in certificate. References found: Po no. 4700171132, Invoice No. 9190025772, Certificate No. SEG-26D-462148. None are LC references.
All three criteria met: invoice reference 9190025772 matches, consignor 'Nouryon Functional Chemicals AB' found in invoice, consignee 'Nouryon Chemicals India Private Ltd' found in invoice Ship To.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Koncernstruktur - consignor search in all invoice pages
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: Consignor name 'Nouryon Functional Chemicals AB' found in invoice header on pages 1, 2, 3, in VAT field, footer, and company seal.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Juridisk part - name comparison with repeated word duplicate rule
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: Certificate name 'Nouryon Functional Chemicals AB' with duplicate line 'Chemicals AB'. All words in the invoice name are present in the certificate name. The only difference is that 'Chemicals AB' is repeated once extra — this is a line-wrap duplicate.
Certificate: SWEDEN. Invoice: Sweden (address) + SE prefix in VAT number. Both Sweden.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Consignee priority ordering - Bill To as primary
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: Invoice has Bill To field with named commercial party 'Nouryon Chemicals India Pvt Ltd.' This is the primary consignee reference.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Legal form abbreviation for consignee - Private vs Pvt
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: 'Nouryon Chemicals India Private Ltd' vs 'Nouryon Chemicals India Pvt Ltd.' — 'Private' ↔ 'Pvt' is a standard legal form abbreviation. Core name identical.
Certificate: India. Invoice Bill To: INDIA. Both India.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Controlled text matching for goods description
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: Certificate 'BERMOCOLLPRIMEAP220/600' = 'BERMOCOLL PRIME AP2 20/600' after space normalization. Invoice: 'BERMOCOLL PRIME AP2 20/600'. Exact character match.
'- SE' suffix in certificate is geographic designation matching origin Sweden. Ignored per 4.3.4.
Box 7 contains 12.384,000KG G.W. per line. This is the verification-grounding quantity.
European format: period as thousands separator. 12.384,000 = 12384.000 in both documents.
Certificate 12,384.000 KG GW per line matches invoice Gross Weight 12,384.000 KG per line exactly.
Invoice explicitly states 'Country of Origin Sweden' for both items 10 and 11.
Certificate 'sweden' → 'Sweden' after case normalization. Invoice 'Sweden'. Match.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The duplicate line 'Chemicals AB' in the certificate consignor might indicate a different company
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The line 'Chemicals AB' is clearly a continuation/duplication of the first line 'Nouryon Functional Chemicals AB'. All words in the invoice name appear in the certificate. Per the repeated word duplicate rule in 4.1.3.1, this is accepted as the same company name with a duplicated tail.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The concatenated product name BERMOCOLLPRIMEAP220/600 might be a different product than BERMOCOLL PRIME AP2 20/600
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Character-by-character comparison after removing spaces shows identical characters: B-E-R-M-O-C-O-L-L-P-R-I-M-E-A-P-2-2-0-/-6-0-0. This is clearly the same product name with spaces removed, likely due to field limitations in the certificate system.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Certificate has two lines of quantity — maybe total should be 24,768 KG
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The certificate has two separate line items, each showing 12,384.000 KG GW. The invoice also has two separate line items (10 and 11), each showing Gross Weight 12,384.000 KG. Per-line comparison matches exactly. No summation required.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Address mismatch for consignee (Thane in Bill To vs Chennai in certificate) might indicate different party
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.2.4, address differences do not in themselves cause MISMATCH for consignee. Company name and country are what matter. The Bill To name 'Nouryon Chemicals India Pvt Ltd.' matches the certificate consignee 'Nouryon Chemicals India Private Ltd' (Private vs Pvt is legal form abbreviation). The Ship To also confirms the exact address in Chennai. The company has multiple locations.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändaren Nouryon Functional Chemicals AB, mottagaren Nouryon Chemicals India Private Ltd, varubeskrivningen Bermocoll Prime AP2 20/600, kvantiteten 12 384 kg bruttovikt per post samt ursprungsland Sverige är verifierade mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
warnings: Certificate consignor field contains a duplicate line 'Chemicals AB' — treated as line-wrap artifact, does not affect verification.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.certificate_value: Nouryon Functional Chemicals AB, Gamlestadsvägen 18 B, 41502 Göteborg, SWEDEN
sections.invoice_value: Nouryon Functional Chemicals AB, BOX 47067, 402 58 Goteborg, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Företagsnamnet identiskt i certifikat och faktura. Duplikatraden 'Chemicals AB' i certifikatet behandlad som radbrytningsartefakt. Land Sverige verifierat via adress och VAT-prefix SE.
sections.motivation: Nouryon Functional Chemicals AB identifierad i fakturans sidhuvud på samtliga sidor. Land Sverige bekräftat.

sections.certificate_value: Nouryon Chemicals India Private Ltd, C/O M/S.Damco India Private Limited, Elavambedu, 601203 CHENNAI, India
sections.invoice_value: Bill To: Nouryon Chemicals India Pvt Ltd., 400708 THANE, INDIA | Ship To: Nouryon Chemicals India Private Ltd., 601203 CHENNAI, INDIA
sections.rule_applied: Mottagaren identifierad i Bill To-fältet. 'Private' vs 'Pvt' accepterad som förkortning av juridisk bolagsform. Land Indien verifierat.
sections.motivation: Nouryon Chemicals India Private Ltd i certifikatet matchar Nouryon Chemicals India Pvt Ltd. i fakturans Bill To. Ship To-adressen bekräftar identisk leveransadress. Land Indien.

sections.rule_applied: Textmatchning efter mellanslagsnormalisering. Certifikatets sammanskrivna 'BERMOCOLLPRIMEAP220/600' motsvarar fakturans 'BERMOCOLL PRIME AP2 20/600'. Suffixet '- SE' är en icke-identitetsbärande geografisk beteckning.
sections.motivation: Produktnamnet BERMOCOLL PRIME AP2 20/600 kan identifieras i båda dokumenten efter normalisering av mellanslag.

sections.invoice_value: Gross Weight 12.384,000 KG (per post, två poster)
sections.rule_applied: Direkt förekomstkontroll per radpost. Tusentalsavskiljare normaliserad. 12 384,000 KG bruttovikt matchar exakt per post.
sections.motivation: Bruttovikt 12 384 KG per post matchar exakt mellan certifikat och faktura. Även kolliantal 600 stämmer.

sections.rule_applied: Ursprungsland Sverige identifierat i explicit Country of Origin-fält i fakturan för båda artikelraderna. Versal-/gemennormalisering tillämpad.
sections.motivation: Sverige angivet som ursprungsland i både certifikat och faktura.

human_readable_report.summary: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland) ger MATCH. Certifikatets uppgifter kan verifieras mot fakturan. Dokumentparet bedöms som IDENTICAL och rekommenderas för automatiskt godkännande.

output_quality_checks.notes: All checkpoints MATCH with confidence >= 0.95. Overall comparison_result IDENTICAL is consistent. No blocking issues detected.
